vocab.meaning: cố bám víu vào chút hy vọng cuối cùng (dùng khi nói về việc tìm lý do giữ lại món quà cũ)
vocab.example: The watch is broken beyond repair, but I'm clutching at straws trying to find a way to fix it because it was a gift from my late grandfather.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc cực kỳ sang trọng/chỉnh tề
vocab.example: I only wear that gold watch when I'm dressed to the nines for formal events like weddings.

vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: I had a whale of a time at my graduation party, and receiving a stylish watch as a gift made it even more unforgettable.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: I know the Swiss watch my uncle gave me must have cost him an arm and a leg, so I treat it with the utmost care.

vocab.meaning: truyền lại cho thế hệ sau
vocab.example: The watch was passed down to me by my father on my 21st birthday, making it a precious family heirloom.
